task_completion.description: Verify the opportunity name and linked account are correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an opportunity named 'GE Aerospace - Predictive Maintenance Platform' associated with the account 'General Electric Company' in the SuiteCRM interface (either in the list view, edit view, or detail view).

task_completion.description: Verify the opportunity amount and expected close date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Amount field set to '$2,750,000' (or 2750000) and the Expected Close Date set to '2026-06-30' or '06/30/2026' depending on the date format.

task_completion.description: Verify the sales stage and probability.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sales Stage field set to 'Proposal/Price Quote' and the Probability (%) field set to '65'.

task_completion.description: Verify the lead source and opportunity type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Lead Source field set to 'Trade Show' and the Type field set to 'New Business'.

Look for the Description field containing the text: 'Predictive maintenance analytics platform for GE Aerospace jet engine fleet. Solution covers vibration analysis, thermal imaging data processing, and remaining useful life prediction. Initial deployment for CFM LEAP engine family across 3 MRO facilities.'

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, not a terminal window using curl or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the opportunity was actually saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the Opportunity Detail View (saved record) or a success confirmation, rather than just leaving the data typed into the Edit View without clicking Save.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL should point to the actual SuiteCRM instance (e.g., localhost or a specific IP/domain), not a local text editor or a static HTML mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Opportunity Name: 'GE Aerospace - Predictive Maintenance Platform'. Target Account: 'General Electric Company'. Target Amount: '2750000' (or $2,750,000). Target Close Date: '2026-06-30'. Target Stage: 'Proposal/Price Quote'. Target Probability: '65'. Target Lead Source: 'Trade Show'. Target Type: 'New Business'. Target Description: 'Predictive maintenance analytics platform for GE Aerospace jet engine fleet. Solution covers vibration analysis, thermal imaging data processing, and remaining useful life prediction. Initial deployment for CFM LEAP engine family across 3 MRO facilities.'
